job_summary: QuinStreet is a pioneer in powering decentralized online marketplaces that match consumers with brands. The Data Analyst role involves becoming an expert in digital marketing campaign performance and strategy, analyzing data to inform business decisions, and communicating insights to improve business outcomes.
